title: Senior Doctor - Divi's Laboratories - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Divi's Laboratories - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!
